name: 1+2 = Fantastic Three
desc: The Human Torch and the Thing united with Moon Girl to protect the Prime Marvel Universe from both threats, and clear the Fantastic Four's name.
The Infinite Crisis has ended; the world mourns the passing of Superboy. But where are Superman, Batman, and Wonder Woman?

name: A Court of Owls
desc: A story arc that occurs with Batman facing off against the Court of Owls, prelude to The Night of Owls.

name: A Death in the Family
desc: The ground-breaking story where people got to vote on the fate of Jason Todd, the second Robin.

name: A Fine Action of an Honorable and Catholic Spaniard
A Lonely Place of Dying
desc: After Jason Todd's death, Batman begins to go on a rampage.

name: A Monster Hunter Walks into a Bar
desc: A story featuring Erica Slaughter that was serialized in the horror anthology Hello Darkness.

name: A.X.E.: Judgment Day
desc: A comic book crossover event published in 2022 by Marvel Comics. The event involves the discovery of the mutant resurrection protocols and the subsequent conflict between the Avengers, the X-Men and the Eternals.

name: Absolute Carnage
desc: Cletus Kasady is back, and he’s deadlier than ever. On a hunt for every Super Hero in the Marvel Universe who has worn a symbiote, Carnage has his eyes on his first victims…starting with some of our favorite Marvel heroes. Everyone is a target!

name: Absolute Power
desc: Amanda Waller seizes power and launches a nationwide crackdown on superheroes.

name: Absolute Power (Superman / Batman)
desc: The reality bending third arc of Superman/Batman

name: Acts of Vengeance
desc: Loki schemes to destroy the Avengers and many of the world's other heroes by recruiting super villains he dubs The Prime Movers: Magneto, Kingpin, Mandarin, Wizard, Dr. Doom, and the Red Skull.

name: Age of Apocalypse
desc: After the death of Charles Xavier at the hands of his own son Legion, his friend Magneto gathers a group of mutants to fight against the oppressive reign of Apocalypse.

name: Age of Revelation
desc: X YEARS FROM TODAY, the Revelation Territories stretch from the Atlantic to the Mississippi – a mutant utopia ruled by the heir of Apocalypse. But beneath the surface, rebellion brews. As a ragtag X-Men team strikes from the shadows, Revelation faces threats from within. It all begins here – the dawn of the AGE OF REVELATION!

name: Age of Ultron
desc: The Earth is plunged into chaos when Ultron returns and conquers it.

name: Age of X
desc: In a world without X-Men, humans attacked the mutant stronghold of Fortress X on a daily basis.

name: Ages of Apocalypse
desc: Apocalypse, in the form of Scott Summers, warps reality.

name: Amalgam
desc: A cross-publisher event of a series of titles put out by both Marvel Comics and DC Comics under the name Amalgam Comics, it blended elements from the two publishers' catalogs.

name: Amazons Attack!
desc: Upon discovering Wonder Woman is being held captive by the U.S government,Hippolyta declares an all out War on all of Man's World.

name: Amazons Attacked
desc: The power of the ancient gods has returned Darkseid to his former self, but he wants more—he wants the throne of Apokolips back! To do that, he’ll need an army more powerful than he’s ever had before. That sounds like the Amazons! Plus, Wonder Woman’s brother Jason has always longed to meet his mother, Hippolyta. Should Wonder Woman help him return home, even if it might lead to the destruction of the Amazons?

name: American Gothic
desc: Storyline that ran through Saga of the Swamp Thing (renamed to Swamp Thing with #46) from issues #37 to #50.

name: Angel at War: The Fall of Saint Dumas
Animal House
desc: Cross-over between Squirrel Girl And Howard the Duck.

name: Annihilation
desc: The Annihilation Wave sweeps through the galaxy extinguishing all life in its path.

name: Annihilation Conquest
desc: Many empires are still rebuilding in the wake of the Annihilation, while others lay in ruins. Enemies new and old rise up in this opportunistic moment to take control of entire empires.

name: Another Return of the Sinister Six
desc: Sandman, Vulture, Mysterio, Venom, Electro and Kraven make an new Sinister Six to hunt down Doc Ock. And Spidey is in trouble as well.

name: Armageddon
desc: Crafted by industry superstar Chip Zdarsky, ARMAGEDDON will impact the entire Marvel Universe, changing the face of Earth’s Mightiest Heroes in a way not seen since AVENGERS: DISASSEMBLED, the event that redefined the team for the 21st century. Groundwork for the event will be laid in upcoming storylines in Zdarsky and Valerio Schiti's CAPTAIN AMERICA (2025) as well as recent developments in the Ultimate Universe, specifically Miles Morales returning home with Origin Boxes in ULTIMATE SPIDER-MAN: INCURSION #5.

name: Armageddon 2001
desc: Matthew Ryder is sent back to 1991 to try to prevent the evil dictator Monarch ever achieving power.

name: Armor Hunters
desc: The ARMOR HUNTERS are coming! A relentless and surgical strike team from the farthest reaches of space – sworn to exterminate the X-O armor and all like it – have found their final target. They will hunt. They will trap. They will kill. And they will rid the universe of the X-O Manowar's incalculable destructive power... even if it means taking the Earth with it.

name: Armor Wars
desc: Iron Man's armor technology has been sold to his rogue's gallery. Upon learning this Iron Man begins a crusade to destroy all traces of his tech even if it means facing off against his friends, the US Government or foreign operatives.

name: Armor Wars II
desc: When industrial villains Kearson Dewitt and the Marrs twins seize control of Tony Stark's central nervous system, he finds himself inexplicably paralyzed and suffering memory loss amidst deadly battles with the Living Laser, who is stronger, and crazier, than ever before.

name: Asgardian Wars
desc: Loki kidnaps Storm & the New Mutants, forcing the X-Men to rescue them.

name: Assassination Game
desc: Bullseye, Deadpool, Constrictor, the Assassins' Guild and even Remy LeBeau's wife Bella Donna. Q: What do they all have in common? A: They all want Gambit dead! But why? Find out in an all-out race for the ragin' Cajun's head!

name: Atlantis Attacks
desc: Ghuar, Llyra, and Attuma join forces to launch an attack on the surface world in a bid for global domination using the armies of Atlantis and Lemuria.

name: Atlantis Rising
desc: Fantastic Four / Namor crossover

name: Avengers / Defenders War
desc: The Avengers battle the Defenders for possession of the Evil Eye. Eventually the two teams realize they are pawns of Loki and Dormmamu and work together to stop the Earth from being absorbed into the Dark Dimension.

name: Avengers Disassembled
desc: The world of the Avengers is rocked to its foundation in this cross-over event, leaving the Earth's Mightiest Heroes broken and changing their lives forever.

name: Avengers vs. X-Men
desc: As a repercussion from the events that took place in The Children's Crusade, Fear Itself, Schism, and X-Sanction, the Avengers and X-Men go to war over the return of the Phoenix Force.

name: Axis
desc: "AXIS" (also known as "Avengers & X-Men: AXIS") is a 2014 comic book story-line published by Marvel Comics.

name: Babewatch
desc: Crossover where male heroes were turned into females and served the villain.

name: Back In Black
desc: A sniper’s bullet changes everything in Peter Parker’s life.

name: Back To Basics
desc: It's a new beginning for the Amazing Spider-Man! Peter Parker's life is turned upside down when a revelation from the past puts his job, relationships and whole life in jeopardy! And as if that's not enough, Spidey must deal with an alien invasion (with a mysterious twist), a new roommate (who's secretly the villainous Boomerang), new wrinkles in his love life — and a dangerous new enemy! But are you ready for…Peter Parker vs. Spider-Man? Someone out there is impersonating Peter…but why? Be here as Nick Spencer and Ryan Ottley kick off a brand new era in Spider-Man's life!

name: Banner of War
desc: A Hulk / Thor crossover event.

name: Batgirl: Wanted
desc: In one moment, Batgirl irrevocably tore her family apart. Faced with no other choice, Barbara Gordon was forced to kill her brother, James Gordon Jr., a madman and a murderer. With James dead and their mother is leaving town, their father-Gotham Police Commissioner Gordon--is on a mission to arrest the person responsible for his son’s death: his own daughter! As the Commissioner unknowingly mounts this manhunt, can Batgirl protect her secret and keep herself out of jail?

name: Batman Incorporated
desc: After traveling through time Bruce Wayne has returned to the present day and is prepared to take his war on crime to the next level, by essentially "franchising" it, by drafting, training and commanding a team of heroes who will fight crime on a global scale representing the bat symbol.

name: Batman R.I.P.
desc: Batman battles the mysterious Doctor Hurt and his Club of Villains.

name: Batman Troika
desc: Bruce Wayne return from his fall as Batman.

name: Batman: Aftershock
desc: Now that the Cataclysm is over, Gotham feels the Aftershock.

name: Batman: Cataclysm
desc: One year after the events of Legacy a huge earthquake hits Gotham, destroying Wayne Manor and cutting the city off from the rest of the world.

name: Batman: Contagion
desc: A deadly plague hits Gotham.

name: Batman: Prelude To the Wedding
desc: A series of one-shots detailing the reactions of many of Batman's friends, family and foes to his impending marriage to Catwoman.

name: Batman: Reborn
desc: Following the Battle for the Cowl, we see the new Batman adjust to his role as the protector of Gotham City.

name: Bats Out of Hell
desc: Tie-in arc to Dark Nights: Metal. The members of the Justice League fight their counterparts from the Dark Multiverse while Batman and Superman are missing in action.

name: Battle for the Cowl
desc: Battle for the Cowl is the story arc that continues the event of Batman RIP. Chaos is overrunning Gotham City and Batman is nowhere to be seen. Who will take up the mantle?

name: Battle of the Atom
desc: The past, present and future versions of the X-Men collide in the biggest war mutantkind has ever seen.

name: Battle of the Century
desc:
In one of the Marvel Universes earliest crossovers, the Hulk goes in search of the Avengers seeking revenge for them replacing him with Captain America and encounters the Fantastic Four along the way.

The story is also notable as being Captain America's first published mission as a member of the Avengers.

name: Battle of Titan
desc: Captain Marvel and Drax battle against Thanos' worshippers.

name: Beast World
desc: The Titans are going green! Every single superhero is powerless to stop the almighty Necrostar from ending every single life on Earth. Can the Avatar of the Green, Swamp Thing, help them out? And is the only Titan able to save the world…Beast Boy?!

name: Before Watchmen
desc: Before Watchmen is a series of comic books published by DC Comics in 2012. Acting as a prequel to the 1986 12-issue Watchmen limited series by writer Alan Moore and artist Dave Gibbons, the project consists of eight limited series and one one-shot (though two were initially planned) for a total of 37 issues.

name: Betty: R.I.P.
desc: The dark plague of the undead has swallowed Riverdale whole, forcing the survivors led by Archie, Betty and Veronica to flee the formerly idyllic town in search of safe haven. The rag-tag group's once-lighthearted romantic rivalries, power struggles and family feuds are now cast in a desperate light, as tensions and emotions are heightened by the fact that any decision, no matter how trivial it may seem, could now be a choice between life and death. And more and more frequently... death is the winner.

name: Big Time
desc: After going through much turmoil, Spider-Man has finally hit the "Big Time" as he now settles into his new life with a new girlfriend, a full-time job with access to new weaponry.

name: Black Reign
desc: Black Adam delivers his brand of liberation to the country of Kahndaq.

name: Black Sun (X-Men)
desc: The sorcerer Belasco returns seeking the spirits of five X-Men to summon his masters, the Elder Gods.

name: Blackest Night
desc: The Blackest Night is the third part of Geoff Johns's trilogy in the Green Lantern universe.

name: Blood and Thunder
desc: Thor has the Warriors' Madness and plans to destroy Asgard.

name: Bloodties
desc: Follow up event to Fatal Attractions that pitted the Avengers and X-Men against Fabian Cortez and Exodus in battle on the island of Genosha.

name: Born Again
desc: The iconic Daredevil story in which Kingpin discovers Daredevil's true identity and sets out to dismantle his life piece by piece.

name: Brand New Day
desc: The events of One More Day have concluded, and Peter Parker's life will never be the same again.

name: Break Downs
desc: A story arc dealing with the disbanding of the Justice League International.

name: Breakout
desc: The story that brought together a new line up of Earths Mightiest Heroes.

name: Brightest Day
desc: Once dead, 12 heroes and villains were resurrected by a white light expelled deep from within the center of the Earth.

name: Brotherhood of the Fist
desc: Connor Hawke teams up with Batman, Nightwing, and Robin to face the mysterious Silver Monkey.

name: Bruce Wayne: Fugitive
desc: Bruce Wayne escapes from prison after being accused of murder. He leaves the name Bruce behind and returns to Gotham as Batman while his friends try to clear his name.

name: Bruce Wayne: Murderer?
desc: Bruce Wayne is found, in his home, holding the dead body of Vesper Fairchild, an ex-girlfriend. He is put in jail and Gotham is without Batman, while Bruce awaits trial.

name: Bruce Wayne: The Road Home
desc: Bruce Wayne, the original Batman is almost home, but the question is what will all those close to him, both good and evil feel about his return?

name: Captain America Reborn
desc: Over two years after Steve Rogers was shot and killed, he's back...or is he? What really was the Red Skull's plan? Is there any hope in seeing Steve Rogers return?

name: Cataclysm
desc: Songbird finds out a deadly secret Government conspiracy to destroy Luke Cage and the Thunderbolts - Forever!

name: Chain Lightning
desc: Wally West has found out that the curse of Cobalt Blue has affected the Flash dynasty, and that between now and the 30th century, two Flashes will die.

name: Character Assassination
desc: Spider-man is accused of a string of "Spider-Tracer" murders and is arrested and convicted on Election Day.

name: Chibi Usagi and the Hoblin of Adachi Plain
Children of the Gods
desc: Who is Wonder Woman’s brother? Whisked away from Themyscira in the dead of night, the mysterious Jason has been hidden somewhere far from the sight of gods and men...but his life and Wonder Woman’s are about to intersect in a terrifying way, bringing them face-to-face with a cosmic threat they never imagined in the forms of Darkseid and Grail!

name: Civil Corps
desc: A civil war threatens to upend everything the various Green Lanterns hold dear.

name: Civil War
desc: Following a catastrophic tragedy caused by super-humans, the US Government passes a Super-Human Registration Act that requires all super-powered individuals in the country to reveal their identities, disclose their powers and personal details, and register as government employees or risk indefinite incarceration. This causes a deep rift in the hero community, with some backing the Act while others oppose it.

name: Clone Saga
desc: Distraught over the death Gwen Stacy and angry at Spider-Man, the Jackal, with the help of Norman Osborn, concocts an elaborate revenge scheme involving cloning. He convinces Peter Parker that he is a clone and forces him to fight multiple copies of himself.

name: Cold War
desc: Steve Rogers and Sam Wilson went their separate ways, each carrying a shield and the mantle of Captain America. However, despite their very different journeys, their paths have led them to the same place: CAPTAIN AMERICA: COLD WAR, a crossover event that will make them question everything they believe in…and each other.

name: Collision (DC)
desc: Red Robin continues his mentor and adoptive father's greatest battle - against Ra's al Ghul and the League of Assassins!

name: Collision (X-23 / Daken)
desc: Daken and X-23 finally have their first real meeting and it does not disappoint.

name: Concrete Jungle
desc: Tefé takes a trip to New York.

name: Convergence
desc: Thought to have been erased, the Pre-New 52 universes remain under the control of Brainiac, until a new being by the name of Telos interferes with them.

name: Countdown to Final Crisis
desc: The search for Ray Palmer and many other other adventures that leads to the Final Crisis

name: Coven
desc: With Rick Jones' life in danger, Captain Marvel thinks this would be an appropriate time to learn all about the nature of law and order... from a serial killer.

name: Crazy Like a Fox
desc: He remade the universe, and he might just unmake it. Captain Marvel's insanity has reached critical mass, and it's going to take the combined efforts of Rick Jones, Marv's mom, the Skrull, the Shi'ar, the Kree, and a new Captain Marvel to rein him in.

name: Crisis on Earth-Prime
desc: The Justice League of America, Justice Society of America, and All-Star Squadron team up to prevent Per Degaton from annihilating the hero-less Earth-Prime

name: Crisis on Infinite Earths
desc: Crisis on Infinite Earths was one of the biggest events in the DCU. It erased the DC Multiverse and rebooted many DC Heroes' origins.

name: Curse of the Mutants
desc: Vampires from around the globe descend on San Francisco, seeking to add the mutant race to their ranks.

name: Dangerous Habits
desc: John Constatine is diagnosed with lung cancer.

name: Dark Circle Rising
desc: When the president of an Affiliated Planet is killed by a legionnaire, intergalactic war erupts. Who are the puppet masters behind these events?

name: Dark Crisis
desc:
In the original Crisis on Infinite Earths by Marv Wolfman and George Pérez, the homeworld of Pariah, along with the infinite Multiverse, was obliterated. Now this mad sole survivor has found a way to bring his homeworld and the entire infinite Multiverse back from the dead: Earth-0 must die.

Dark Crisis is a 2022 comic book storyline published by DC Comics, comprising an eponymous central mini-series by writer Joshua Williamson and artist Daniel Sampere, and a number of tie-in books.

name: Dark Cybertron
desc: An event published by IDW between 2013 and 2014. It coincided with the Transformers Brand 30th anniversary and second anniversary of IDW's most recent relaunch of their Transformers comics. This storyline takes place in alternating issues of More than Meets the Eye and Robots in Disguise with special one-shots that make up the first and last chapter. It was produced in conjunction with Hasbro's Transformers: Generations toyline and both the prelude and the event itself (eighteen issues long) were packaged with Generations figures, all of which were incorporated into the story. Dark Cybertron was followed by the Dawn of the Autobots post-event branding made as a good jumping on point for new readers and introducing the new Windblade mini-series.

name: Dark Days
desc: The prelude to the Dark Nights Metal event.

name: Dark Knight, Dark City
desc: A Dark secret from the past returns.

name: Dark Nights: Metal
desc: The story involves Batman discovering a dark multiverse that exists beneath the core DC multiverse. It is revealed that both multiverses are connected through mysterious metals that Batman has encountered over the years. His investigations eventually result in him releasing seven evil versions of himself from the dark multiverse, led by the dark god known as Barbatos, who plans to unleash darkness across every Earth.

name: Dark Reign
desc: The Invasion is finally over, and a group of villains lead by Norman Osborn are ready to turn the Marvel Universe upside down.

name: Dark Web
desc: An American comic book crossover event written by Zeb Wells with art by Adam Kubert, published in 2022 by Marvel Comics. The event involves Spider-Man and the X-Men joining forces against Ben Reilly and Madelyne Pryor as the two wronged clones are teaming up as Chasm and Goblin Queen to raise hell across the Marvel Universe.

name: Darkness
desc: What force on this planet - nay, this universe - can turn Earth's deadliest villains into heroes?

name: Darkseid War
desc: Two of the most deadly villains of the DC Multiverse, the Dark God Darkseid and the Anti God the Anti-Monitor, take aim at each other, with the Justice League and the entire human race caught in the crossfire.

name: Day of Blood
desc: The emperor of the Klingon Empire, Kahless II, declares war on all who do not follow the cult of the Red Path.

name: Day of Judgment
desc: The demon Etrigan is finding the unhosted Spectre to give its powers to the Asmodel, and release hell on Earth. All the heroes are empowered against the hordes of demon. On Earth the Sentinels Of Magic come up with a plan to stop Asmodel's army of Demons.

name: Day of Vengeance
desc: The Spectre has gone mad and is attacking and killing hundreds of magic users.

name: DC K.O.
desc: DC is pulling no punches this fall with DC K.O., a massive new comic book event from powerhouse writers Joshua Williamson and Scott Snyder, kicking off in October. Picture a high-stakes cosmic tournament where heroes and villains are thrown into gladiator-style battles across a colossal, Earth-risen arena, each level more brutal and symbolic than the last. The goal? Generate enough Omega Energy to challenge a godlike Darkseid and crown a new King Omega.

name: DC One Million
desc: When heroes from the far future came to the present to invite the modern JLA to an event in the century 853, is when a old enemy of the past and a dangerous menace from thefuture attack two eras to destroy the legacy of the heroes.

name: Dead Heat
desc: There is a new villain around, and he knows about the Speedforce.

name: Dead Zone
desc: Spawn loses his powers.

name: Death of a King
desc: Aquaman has returned as the King of Atlantis, but their is another who claims the throne: The First King.

name: Death of Superman
desc: When the alien monster Doomsday surfaces on Earth, Superman may be the only hero powerful enough to save the planet from Doomsday's wrath. But who will save Superman from Doomsday?

name: Death of the Family
desc: After a year's absence, Joker is back and he's not playing around this time, as he guns for Batman and his family of allies that Joker believes makes him weak.

name: Death Spiral
desc: A new super-powered serial killer is on the loose, and they’re coming for Spidey, Venom and everyone in between. But what terrible secret has Carnage learned? And what does it have to do with Spider-Man?!

name: Deathtrap
desc: Jericho has attacked both the Titans and the Teen Titans. Can they make him pay? Will Vigilante go too far?

name: Decimation
desc: The aftermath of the House of M.

name: Defiant
desc: Deals with the reemergence of the underground superhero team New Warriors in the public eye.

name: Demon In A Bottle
desc: Tony Stark`s battle with alcoholism. Stark`s drinking problem surfaces several times and was the cause of his loss of Stark International.

name: Destroyer
desc: A mad bomber destroys Gotham's modern buildings to improve the aesthetic look of the city.

name: Devil's Reign (Marvel)
desc: The story details Mayor Wilson Fisk planning to stop the superhero activities in New York City which even involves a variation of his Thunderbolts group.

name: Dire Wraiths War
desc: The Dire Wraiths try to take control of Earth.

name: Divided We Stand
desc: A story that deals with the aftermath of Messiah Complex.

name: Doom Supreme
desc: Dr. Doom briefly reigns supreme over the world by use of an undetectable neuro-gas that places anyone who inhales it under his mental control.

name: Doomwar
desc: Doctor Doom and Desturi politically takeover Wakanda for the precious metal Vibranium.

name: Down in the Ground Where the Dead Men Go
Drowned Earth
desc: In the aftermath of the Justice League’s battle with the Legion of Doom, an armada from the stars has come to plunder the Earth and its seas. With powers beyond comprehension, even Superman, Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman and the rest of the League’s combined might can’t stop these invaders. With nowhere left to turn, these heroes will have to turn to an ancient power to help them, one that even Arthur Curry fears unleashing.

name: Earth 2: World's End
desc: Story arc spinning out of the Earth 2 series.

name: Earthwar
desc: Earthwar was a story based in the 30th Century, featuring the Legion of Super-Heroes defending Earth and the United Planets from the Khunds, the Dominators, and the Dark Circle.

name: Eighty Eyes On An Evil Island
Elseworlds
desc: DC Comics 1994 Annual Event.

name: Emerald Outlaw
desc: Green arrows fly—and people are dying! But when the media and police point their fingers at Green Arrow, it’s up to Ollie and Black Canary to find the real killer of high-profile Seattleites. Their prime suspects? A who’s who of archers including Emiko Queen and a deadly Green Arrow villain not seen in years!

name: End of an Era
desc: The forces of Mordru and Glorith unite, but can the Legion of Super-Heroes defeat the evil?

name: End Times
desc: Is it time for the Avengers to call it quits?

name: Endangered Species
desc: Following the events of the House of M, mutants are on the brink of extinction with no new mutancy occurring in the human race. Will this be the end, or a new beginning for mutantkind?

name: Endgame
desc: Following the events of "Death of the Family", the Joker returns to Gotham, determined to destroy Batman and the city once and for all.

name: Ending Battle
desc: When Superman foes start to attack people close to Clark Kent, the man of steel will have to push his abilities to the limit to protect his friends and family and stop the endless legion of enemies and the puppet-master in the shadows. But if that isn't enough, will he betray his principle to avenge his loved ones?

name: Endless Winter
desc: 1000 years ago, a disparate group of heroes – Hippolyta, Black Adam, Swamp Thing and the Viking Prince – banded together to prevent the world from freezing at the hands of the Frost King, an exiled Norse god with the ability to control entire ecosystems. The heroes triumphed, but victory came at a terrible price, one that has been kept secret until now.

name: Enemy of the State
desc: A mission to rescue a young child goes horribly wrong as Wolverine is brainwashed by both HYDRA and the Hand.

name: Escape from Bizarro World
desc: When Jonathan Kent is kidnapped by Bizarro, Superman rushes to the rescue.

name: Escape From Riverdale
desc: When Jughead’s beloved pet Hot Dog is killed in a hit and run, Jughead turns to the only person he knows who can help bring back his furry best friend—Sabrina the Teenage Witch. Using dark, forbidden magic, Sabrina is successful and Hot Dog returns to the land of the living. But he’s not the same… and soon, the darkness he brings back with him from beyond the grave begins to spread, forcing Archie, Betty, Veronica and the gang to try to escape from Riverdale!

name: Escape from the Negative Zone
desc: Three-part 2011 Marvel crossover that takes Steve Rogers into the Negative Zone to rescue the X-Men from Blastaar.

name: Eve of Destruction
desc: Magneto has liberated the mutants of Genosha and claims the island country as his own.

name: Everything Burns
desc: A The Mighty Thor / Journey Into Mystery Crossover

name: Evil Factory
desc: The Agenda had plans of creating a race of superior beings by manipulating the DNA.

name: Evolutionary War
desc: The High Evolutionary attempts to evolve the human race into a more advanced species.

name: Exiled
desc: Crossover between New Mutants and Journey into Mystery.

name: Exiled (Spider-Man)
desc: Peter Parker struggles with the decision of if he is going to pass on the webs to his clone Ben Reily in favor of leading a normal life.

name: Eye of the Beholder
desc: Sensei is back and is going after the mask known as the Beholder.

name: Fables
desc: Storyline from DC taking place in the annuals of Batman, Green Arrow and The Question.

name: Facades
desc: A 3-part story arc which sees the first reunion of Iron Man and Madame Masque after their break-up.

name: Face the Face
desc: Batman and Robin return to find changes in Gotham City after a year's absence.

name: Faces of Evil
desc: The DC Universe from the point of view of it's villains.

name: Fall of Metropolis
desc: A five-part storyline published in 1994.

name: Fall of the House of Vista (2000 AD)
Fall of the House of X
desc: Mutantkind has never had a greater fall. From the highs of Krakoa – their own glorious nation, a place where they were safe and happy – to the lowest of lows. Outlawed, hunted, killed, most of their kind missing or dead, and now, one their greatest leaders, Cyclops, is on trial facing a death penalty. Ready or not, the time has come for the X-Men to make their final stand against the forces that have struck them low. The day is now. The place is here. The tale of the house Xavier built will long be told…and few will forget this darkest chapter.

name: Fall of the Hulks
desc: With so many Hulks running around, the end is near for some.

name: Fall of the Mutants
desc: Fall of the Mutants was an event in which dramatic changes were made to the status quo of the X-men, X-Factor and New Mutant Teams.

name: Fatal Attractions
desc: Magneto and his Acolytes fight the various X-teams.

name: Faustus Affair
desc: A crossover between Captain America & Nomad (Jack Monroe).

name: Fear Itself
desc: In a time of fear and uncertainty, the Avengers make plans to rebuild Asgard, while Sin enacts a mysterious plan to fulfill her destiny and resurrect a forgotten god of fear.

name: Fear State
desc:
A comic book crossover story-line published by DC Comics in late 2021, featuring Batman and his family. Primarily written by James Tynion IV, the arc is his second and final major arc on Batman in DC Rebirth. The main story was from Batman (vol. 3) #112–117, also including multiple tie-in issues.

The story involves Scarecrow wanting to control Gotham City using fear, and Mayor Christopher Nakano's mission to protect the city with his ground-breaking deal with the Magistrate (similar to an alternate future in "Future State"). This story introduces new characters Miracle Molly and Ghost-Maker and debuts Jace Fox as Batman. The crossover event received positive reviews from critics, with critics praising the action, art, and tie-ins, but the main story received criticism for its sluggish pacing.

name: Feral
desc: Spider-Man teams up with Black Cat when New York begins to display strange animalistic behavior.

name: First Contact
desc: Crossover between Batman/Superman and Worlds' Finest

name: First Sign
desc: Manhattan is plunged into chaos when the revamped Zodiac strikes! Only Cap, Thor & Shell-head can save New York City from the all-new Zodiac!

name: First to Last
desc: Something happened to Cyclops, Marvel Girl, Beast, Angel, Iceman and Professor X years ago, a secret so horrible that it has been locked away in the dark corner of Cyclops' mind until today. What crisis strikes in the present that calls upon memories of the past?

name: Five Miles South of the Universe
Flashpoint
desc: There's a fissure in time that is leaving repercussions in the past, present, and future.

name: Flowers for Rhino
desc: Rhino undergoes a brain operation that turns him into a super-genius.

name: Forces Of Darkness, Forces Of Light
Forever Evil
desc: Spinning out of the conclusion of Trinity War, the Justice League is dead, and the Secret Society of Super Villains lead by the Crime Syndicate of Earth 3 take over Earth.

name: Forever Evil: Blight
desc: John Constantine struggles to find out what happened to Zatanna and the rest of his teammates after Pandora's box was opened.

name: Futures End
desc: A story arc set five years in the future of the New 52 in DC Comics.

name: Gang War (Marvel)
desc: Spinning out of Zeb Wells and John Romita Jr.’s hit run of AMAZING SPIDER-MAN, GANG WAR will see a war erupt between the gang lords of New York City, causing chaos throughout the Big Apple. Villains are fighting villains. Criminals are fighting criminals. Hobgoblin, Mr. Negative, the Owl, Shotgun, Diamondback, A.I.M., Hydra, and more battle with and against each other for NYC supremacy. For Peter Parker, “going on patrol” isn't enough... and he declares his own war on super-crime. It’s General Spidey at the helm, leading a group of heroes that includes fellow Spider-Man Miles Morales, She-Hulk, Daredevil, and Spider-Woman. Their goal: take down the super-gangs in under 48 hours. But what does Mayor Luke Cage and the city's strong anti-vigilante laws have to say about it? Will Jackpot gamble on getting involved? And is Shang-Chi a friend or foe? They better all figure it out before two classic villains make a game-changing return!

name: Generations Saga
desc: While Infinity Inc is starting out, their parents - the Justice Society of America - are overwhelmed by the Stream of Ruthlessness, causing them to violently pursue their darkest desires.

name: Genesis
desc: A DC Comics event from 1997 that ran through many books in the DCU as well as the Genesis mini-series. The story focused on the New Gods, detailing how the "Godwave" was the source of the universes superpowers.

name: Ghosts
desc: This story arc dealt with a character encountering ghosts of friends or enemies coming back to help them or haunt them. It is revealed in the JLA annual that Hermes Tris Megistus is responsible for weakening the veil between life and death.

name: Ghostwalk
desc: The rise of Kit Walker into becoming the Last Phantom.

name: Girlfrenzy!
desc: Not so much a story arc but a series of one-shots released in 1998, focusing on female characters who play important roles on some of DC's main titles.

name: God of Fear, God of War
Godbomb
desc: Somewhere at the end of time, all the gods of the universe are enslaved, working to build a machine that will forever change the face of creation. What is...the Godbomb? And what can Thor, the last free god in all the cosmos, do to stop it? As Gorr's master plan continues to unfold, all hope for divinity is lost as Thor finds himself in chains alongside his fellow gods. As the clock ticks down on one very large bomb, as enslaved gods look to the skies for a savior, enter...the Girls of Thunder?

name: Godhead
desc: The New Gods come to war with the Lantern Corps representing the Emotional Spectrum in search for a power to defeat Darkseid.

name: Godwatch
desc: Since the moment Wonder Woman arrived in our world, Godwatch has been waiting. But who are they, and what do they want? Diana’s journey to the truth that she’s been seeking since Rebirth continues here. Plus, when a girl’s soul is ripped from her body, Wonder Woman must travel through to Themyscira and free Ares!

name: Gorilla Warfare
desc: Gorilla Grodd invades Central City.

name: Gotham Resistance
desc:
The Batman Who Laughs, along with his pals in the Nightmare Batmen, have helped accelerate the transformation and terra-forming of GOTHAM CITY into a twisted mosaic of monsters, magic and doom!

Trapped inside the Riddler’s deadly maze with nowhere to turn, Robin soon assembles an unlikely team of hometown heroes including Batgirl, Harley Quinn, Killer Croc, Black Canary and Green Arrow to find the missing Nightwing and save their city!

name: Great Darkness Saga
desc: The Great Darkness Saga chronicles the fight between the Legion of Super-Heroes against the newly-risen Darkseid, the New God of Apokolips.

name: Hands of the Mandarin
desc: Mandarin launches an unrelenting series of attacks on Iron Man and Force Works.

name: Harbinger Wars
desc: For decades, Toyo Harada’s Harbinger Foundation and the government’s own Project Rising Spirit have been waging a secret war over the rarest resource known to man – the unwieldy superhuman telekinetics known as harbingers. Over the years, they’ve each collected a small army of these empowered children to inflict their agendas on the world. But now the reformed harbinger hunter known as Bloodshot needs to atone for his crimes – and he’s going to start by releasing two dozen of the most volatile harbingers from their PRS prison and into the world.

name: Hard Traveling Heroes: The Next Generation
desc: Connor Hawke and Kyle Rayner team up and travel around.

name: Hate Crimes
desc: Nicholas Kotero breaks out prison and instigates race riots in New York City.

name: Head Lopper and the Crimson Tower
Heart of the Amazon
desc: Wonder Woman takes a moment to catch her breath and attend a friend’s wedding…but unfortunately, horror follows her even there, putting the life of her friend Etta Candy in danger! Then, learn more about the tumultuous partnership between Wonder Woman and Steve Trevor.

name: Heart of the Atom
desc: The Avengers and Hulk battle Psyklop in the two-part story which introduces Hulk to the Microverse.

name: Heck's Angels
desc: A cross-over between Supergirl and Young Justice

name: Hell On Earth War
desc: The various Hell lords battle for domination.

name: Hellfire Gala
desc: Annual festive X-event in the style of the Met Gala.

name: Heroes Return
desc: An "unofficial" story-line from Marvel Comics, trumpeting the return to Earth-616 all of the "dead" heroes trapped in a pocket dimension during the Onslaught Saga.

name: Home Is Where the Hatred Is
House of M
desc: Reality is flipped upside down by the Scarlet Witch when mutants are the ruling majority.

name: How the Max Got His Stripes
Hush
desc: Batman faces a new enemy who knows his secret identity and is out to destroy both Bruce Wayne and Batman.

name: I Am Bane
desc: The man who has physically tested the Dark Knight like no one before is back to finally break the Bat for good. Can a battered, exhausted Batman fend off one of his greatest foes?

name: I Am Gotham
desc: The Caped Crusader has never been stopped. Not by the Joker. Not by Two-Face. Not even by the Justice League. But now, in the wake of DC UNIVERSE: REBIRTH, Batman faces his most challenging foe ever—the idealistic hero known as Gotham, who wants to save the city from Batman himself!

name: I Can't Believe It's Not The Justice League
desc: Booster Gold manages to accidentally send his entire team to hell. When they escape into a parallel dimension, they encounter their villainous counterparts.

name: Identity Crisis
desc: The Elongated Man's wife, Sue Dibny, is murdered. The DC superheroes rally to find out who committed the crime.

name: If Me Could Turn Back Time
Inferno
desc: After manipulating Madelyne Pryor and Magik, a horde of demons attack an unsuspecting Manhattan as the X-Men, X-Factor, New Mutants and Excalibur face the consequences.

name: Infinite Crisis
desc: In the chaos ensuing after the unleashing of the OMACs on Earth, the Spectre's vendetta against magic, and the Rann-Thanagar War, four beings decide to try and save the universe: Superman and Lois Lane of Earth-Two, Superboy of Earth-Prime, and Alexander Luthor of Earth-Three.

name: Infinity
desc: While the Avengers join forces with a cosmic armada to repel the Builders, Thanos takes advantage of their absence to lay siege to Earth.

name: Infinity Crusade
desc: Adam Warlock's discarded good side, the Goddess, recruits devout heroes and assembles the cosmic cubes to create a cosmic egg that would provide her with the power to purge all evil from the universe.

name: Infinity Gauntlet
desc: Death resurrects Thanos who acquires the six infinity gems and kills half the life in the universe in her honor with the Infinity Gauntlet.

name: Infinity War
desc: Adam Warlock's bad side, the Magus, separates from his body and assembles the Infinity Gauntlet.

name: Inhumanity
desc: Dealing with the aftermath of the "Infinity" event when the Terrigen Mists are released throughout the world and activate dormant "Inhuman" cells in ordinary people.

name: Inhumans vs. X-Men
desc: Following the spread of Terrigen Mists throughout the world during Infinity and the changing of the mist after Time Runs Out to be deadly to Mutants, Inhumans and Mutants go to war over the mists continued existence.

name: Insect Queen
desc: A re-imagining of Silver Age Lana Lang's role as the Insect Queen.

name: Invasion!
desc: The Dominators along with many other alien races, form an alliance to take out the Earth and it's meta-human heroes.

name: Invisible Mafia
desc: The Daily Planet teeters on the brink of disaster! A new criminal element has made its way onto the streets of Superman's hometown!

name: JLApe
desc: Gorilla Grodd uses his own mastery of technology as well as guile to change the human world into Apes!

name: Joker: Last Laugh
desc: The Joker, thinking he is going to die, wreaks havoc across the DC Universe.

name: Judgment Day
desc: The Overmaster has returned to conquer Earth, and only the combined membership of the various Justice League teams can stop him!

name: Just Imagine Stan Lee
desc: A series of one-shot specials helmed by Marvel Comics pioneer Stan Lee.

name: Justice League vs. Suicide Squad
desc: Following the discovery of Task Force X, the Justice League aims to shut the team down.

name: Justice Leagues
desc: Alien invaders use Hector Hammond to make the world forget that the Justice League of America had ever existed, only to find the individual members of the Justice League instinctively creating new crime-fighting organizations.

name: K (Superman / Batman)
desc: Superman & Batman decide to rid the Earth of all the Kryptonite. In doing so they discover a government conspiracy bent on destroying Superman.

name: Kal-El Returns
desc: Superman returns to Earth!

name: Killer Instinct
desc: Impossible targets call for impossible shots — and no one can make them like Domino! Marvel’s #1 soldier of fortune is back in an explosive new series! The product of a failed Super-Soldier Program, Neena Thurman always made her own luck as the sharpshooting mercenary known as Domino…but what happens when her own powers betray her? The hunter becomes the hunted as every merc in the game smells blood in the water — and Domino’s formerly charmed life is turned upside down! But is Shang-Chi, Master of Kung Fu, about to get lucky? If he plays his cards right, he is! Plus: Secrets from the past! Amadeus Cho lends a hand! And who is Domino’s evil counterpart? Project Armageddon may just live up to its name!

name: Killer Instinct (Image)
desc: A crossover between WildC.A.T.S. and Cyberforce

name: King in Black
desc: The long-dreaded arrival of Knull, god of the symbiotes, is almost at hand. Backed by a massive army of symbiotic monsters, the terrifying new villain poses a threat unlike any the Marvel Universe has ever seen.

name: Kingdom Come
desc: When Superman goes into retirement after the rise of numerous vigilante "heroes", who will defend the world against the coming destruction?

name: Knight Terrors
desc: When Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman find the body of one of their earliest enemies inside the Hall of Justice, their investigation takes them past the land of the living, beyond the land of the dead, and directly to a new villain called Insomnia, who uses his powers to engulf every single hero and villain in their own dark and twisted nightmares. The only way to save the world is to call for the help of an unlikely hero—Deadman!

name: Knightfall
desc: Seeking Gotham as his ultimate prize, the Santa Priscan crime lord Bane wages a slow-burning war to wear Batman down - bringing the Dark Knight to his knees before Bane breaks him.

name: Knightquest: The Crusade
desc: Jean Paul Valley becomes increasingly violent, believing it is necessary in order to deal with the criminals of post-Bane Gotham.

name: Knightquest: The Search
desc: Bruce Wayne and Alfred leave Gotham for England in search of Jack Drake and Shondra Kingsolving.

name: KnightsEnd
desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham to find that his replacement, Jean Paul Valley, has become increasingly violent and reckless.

name: Korvac Quest
desc: The power of Korvac was sent through time to his ancestors and it is up to the Guardians of the Galaxy to find it and stop it

name: Kraven's First Hunt
desc: Kraven's young daughter, Ana Kravinoff, has shown up hunting Spider-Man like a prey. However, she mistakenly thinks that Vin Gonzales, Peter's roommate, is Spider-Man and kidnaps him. Peter is forced to save his roommate while using the costume and alias of Daredevil because Ana forced Vin to wear the Spider-Man costume.

name: Krisis of the Krimson Kryptonite
desc: Superman deals with losing his powers following exposure to Red Kryptonite.

name: Krypton Returns
desc: A Super-family crossover.

name: Last Rites
desc: In the aftermath of Batman RIP, Last Rites will fill the gaps that leads to Final Crisis.

name: Lazarus Planet
desc: A 2023 American comic book crossover storyline written by Mark Waid and Gene Luen Yang, with art by Ricardo Federici and Billy Tan published by DC Comics. The event involves the warring Chinese deities-turned demons Nezha and King Fire Bull, whose conflict causes a volcano on Lazarus Island to erupt, releasing mystical storms worldwide that cause many people to gain new powers and abilities. The event received positive reviews, with critics praising the art, action, and main story while criticizing the tie-ins.

name: Le Garage Hermétique de Jerry Cornélius
Legacy (Marvel)
desc: To save a world overrun by the Legacy Virus, what will the Exiles sacrifice?

name: Legends
desc: Darkseid and the Phantom Stranger debate the nature of humanity. Darkseid vows to make humanity forsake its heroes.

name: Legends of the Dead Earth
desc:
"Earth is dead. Those who once might have called it home are long scattered to the endless stars. But in that scattering, on a thousand different worlds, by a thousand different ways... Earth's greatest legends live on. These are... Legends of the Dead Earth." 
 
DC's 1996 annual event was branded as Legends of the Dead Earth. These are not officially labeled as Elseworld tales but many consider them to be Elseworlds because they take place in the distant future and feature stories influenced by the legends/stories/legacies of the heroes and villains of the past for that particular title. A few of these annuals are actually in continuity because the characters are from the distant future. Twenty-five annuals had the Legends of the Dead Earth branding.

name: Legion Quest
desc: Professor X's son Legion attempts to realize his father's dreams by killing his worst enemy.

name: Lethla Protector (1993)
desc: After Venom (Eddie Brock) made an agreement with Spider-Man, he now protects innocents from harm in San Francisco, CA.

name: Life After Death
desc: The new Black Mask is in a turf war with the Falcone crime family and all of Gotham is caught in the middle of it.

name: Lifeform
desc: A bizarre virus infects a human being, and evolves into a powerful, sentient menace known as... Lifeform

name: Lightning and Stars
desc: Crossover between Starman and Power of SHAZAM!

name: Lightning Strikes Twice
desc: A new storm brews over Central City and disproves the old adage about lightning never striking twice! Just as Barry begins to feel overwhelmed fighting crime, a new speedster appears—but just where did this amazing new ally come from? Now, the Fastest Man Alive finds himself in a city of speedsters—and dealing with the reappearance of Wally West!

name: Lightning Strikes Twice (2005)
desc: Get ready for a spectacular 3-part story that brings together the Man of Steel and Captain Marvel!

name: Lights Out
desc: Relic, a being from another universe, aims to destroy the emotional spectrum of the Lantern Corps.

name: Live Kree or Die
desc: The Kree Lunatic Legion have a plot to kill the human race.

name: Lois Lane, Back at the Planet
Lonely Jerry and the Multi-Dimensional Sales Opportunity
Long Hot Summer
desc: Milestone's company wide crossover event.

name: Lost Hearts
desc: Lana Lang is missing and only Clark Kent can find her.

name: Lynch: One Last Thing
desc: John Lynch attempts to kill Tao.

name: Mad Dog Ward
desc: Spider-Man is sent to a mental institution.

name: Magnum Opus
desc: Deadpool unleashes his most insane plan yet: a full-on assault against Norman Osborn!

name: Manifest Destiny
desc: Chronicles the X-Men's move to San Francisco.

name: Mash-Up
desc: Superman and Batman find themselves trapped in a strange universe where every hero/villain is an amalgam of two other heroes/villains they know. Eventually they discover who the culprit is: a revived Doctor Destiny.

name: Maximum Clonage
desc: The finale to the Spider-Man Clone Saga.

name: Maximum Security
desc: Earth becomes a prisoner world for space convicts.

name: Mercury Falling
desc: Mercury is captured by The Facility.

name: Messiah Complex
desc: The X-Men discover what may be the last hope for their race--the birth of the first new mutant since M-Day.

name: Midnight Sun
desc: Three months back on the job, and they're already coming out of the woodwork. The bad guys you expect. The gangsters and the hoods with old axes to grind. They all come with the territory. But the heroes - them you don't expect. Popping up to give you the eyeball and make sure you're toeing the line. Their line. Spider-Man... Frank Castle, the angel of death himself...even the fugitive Captain America. And now, this other thing. Someone is out there. Someone hitting the old haunts, scenes of the old crimes. Leaving messages. Leaving bodies. Someone who knows you. Someone who crushes steel and pulls off limbs. All to get your attention. Someone out of your league!

name: Milk Wars
desc: A 2018 American comic book crossover published by DC Comics. It features the publisher's core characters—such as Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman—crossing over with the characters of their imprint Young Animal.

name: Millennium
desc: The Manhunters returned to dominate the universe and crush the heroes of Earth.

name: Millennium Giants
desc: A story-line in 1998 that span multiple Superman family titles.

name: Muir Island Saga
desc: The Shadow King has been planning the fall of Xavier for a long time.

name: Mutant Massacre
desc: The Mutant Massacre was the 1986 crossover event from Marvel Comics.

name: Muvovum
desc: The second arc of Richard Corben's Den.

name: Mys-Tech Wars
desc: Nick Fury and Shield, Professor X and the X-Men, Capt. America and the Avengers, X-Factor, Dr. Strange, etc go after the Mys-Tech bad guys.

name: Natural Resources
desc: The mutants have proved their worth, but at what cost?

name: Necrosha
desc: A cross-over event in New Mutants, X-Force & X-Men: Legacy.

name: Nefaria Protocols
desc: The Thunderbolts and Earth's Mightiest Heroes stand side-by-side against Count Nefaria, master of ionic energy!

name: New Krypton
desc: After defeating Brainiac, Superman frees the bottled cities of Metropolis and Kandor. But what will happen with Earth when 100000 Kryptonians decide to adopt Earth as their new home planet?

name: New Maps of Hell
desc: An alien being known only as Z draws the various members of the League into a deadly web of illusions.

name: New Ways to Die
desc: Norman Osborn finally sets his target on Spider-Man since Brand New Day started.

name: Night of the Monster Men
desc: At the same time a hurricane strikes Gotham, Hugo Strange unleashes giant mutant creatures to raze the city. Batman, Nightwing, and the rest of Gotham's Vigilantes use everything at their disposal to take down the Monster Men and locate Strange before the Gotham in destroyed.

name: Nimrod
desc: The X-Men must contend with the return of Nimrod.

name: No Man's Land
desc: After a devastating earthquake, Gotham is declared a disaster zone and closed to the outside world.

name: No Surrender
desc: Earth becomes the playing field for a new cosmic game between two Elders of the Universe: the Grandmaster and the Challenger.

name: Officer Down
desc: After Commissioner Jim Gordon is shot, Batman has to employ his skills as the world's greatest detective to discover the true culprit.

name: One More Day
desc: What will Peter give up to save his Aunt?

name: One World Under Doom
desc: A 2025 comic book event, focused on the villain Doctor Doom who brings about a new world order after gaining the title of the Sorcerer Supreme.

name: One Year Later
desc: One year after the events of Infinite Crisis, the DC Universe's biggest three heroes (Superman, Wonder Woman, Batman) finally return after disappearing for a year.

name: Onslaught
desc: The culmination of the X-Traitor storyline and then leads in to Heroes Reborn.

name: Operation: Galactic Storm
desc: Operation: Galactic Storm was a 19 part Avengers event.

name: Original Sin
desc: Someone killed the Watcher and now all the secrets of the Marvel Universe will be revealed.

name: Our Worlds At War
desc: 2001 DC Summer Crossover.

name: Outsiders: Five of a Kind
desc: An Outsiders story-line where Batman announces that he's holding auditions for the Outsiders.

name: Over the Edge
desc: The Punisher is finally captured and SHIELD is chartered with delivering him to a maximum security prison to await trail.

name: Path of Doom
desc: Superman returns to Metropolis just in time to meet the city’s newest protector: Lex Luthor. But it’s not long before these dueling titans meet someone unexpected: Clark Kent?! The two archenemies must put aside their differences to face the common threat of Doomsday, as Jimmy Olsen and the staff of the Daily Planet try to uncover the truth: Who is the man claiming to be Clark Kent?

name: Phalanx Covenant
desc: The Phalanx attempt to take over the Earth and join the collective on the home planet.

name: Phoenix Resurrection (Malibu)
desc: The Phoenix Force comes to Malibu Comics.

name: Planet DC
desc: An event for DC Comics in 2000.

name: Planet Hulk
desc: Hulk gets trapped on another planet by the Illuminati where he overthrows the emperor and becomes their king.

name: Planet of the Living Dead
desc:
A five part series from Antarctic Press and the order in which they should be read

1. Planet of the Living Dead
2. Return to the Planet of the Living Dead
3. Battle for the Planet of the Living Dead
4. Escape from the Planet of the Living Dead
5. Conquest of the Planet of the Living Dead

name: Power and Responsibility
desc: Judas Traveller lures both Peter Parker and Ben Reilly into the Ravencroft Sanitarium so he can probe, test and torture them mentally.

name: Powerless
desc: The High Evolutionary de-powers mutants around the globe.

name: Prodigal
desc: In the aftermath of Knightfall Batman leaves Gotham City and the Batsuit in the hands of Dick Grayson

name: Queen in Black
desc: On the farthest edges of the solar system, Knull, God of the Void, builds a brand-new army to destroy Earth... but Hela of Asgard might have gotten there first — as she makes planetfall with a legion of the galaxy's deadliest symbiotes! Two of the most powerful evils in the galaxy are at war... A cosmic collision of evil versus evil with Venom, Mary Jane and Dylan Brock caught right in the middle!

name: Quest For Magik
desc: Belasco searches for Magik!

name: Questions
desc: The Hellspawn appears on Earth with little memory of his past.

name: Rage Against the Machine
desc: X-Men crossover which launched the briefly lived M-Tech line.

name: Rage of the Red Lanterns
desc: Seeking vengeance against the Guardians for the Massacre of Space Sector 666, and revenge against Sinestro for imprisoning him on Ysmault, Atrocitus harnesses the power of anger to create the Red Lantern Corps.

name: Rann / Thanagar War
desc: A planetary war erupts between two worlds and the universe will be threatened to be dragged to a universal war.

name: Rann-Thanagar Holy War
desc: Two races forever at war. Now, beliefs and religious differences will escalate the animosity between Rann and Thanagar and put these two races at the brink of extinction.

name: Realm of Kings
desc: Realm of Kings is the physical and political repercussions of the War of Kings.

name: Seven Walls and A Pit Trap
Sometimes A Great Notion Goes Awry
Star Wars Shadows of the Empire
Superman and the Legion of Super-Heroes
That was Now, This is Then
The Best Radioactive Man Event Ever
The Book of the Iron Fist
The Breaking of So Great A Thing
The Case of the Electric Boy
The Day of The Krypton Man
The Day the Law Died (Judge Dredd)
The Death and Life of Oliver Queen
The Death of the Mighty Thor
The Fall of Barbarbara Grimm (Judge Dredd)
The Fall of the Fantastic Four
The Fall of the House of Atreus
The Fall of the House of Kane
The Far Reaching Tentacles of N'Rygoth
The Ghost At the Heart of the Atom
The Good, the Bad & the Ugly
The Least, The Lost & The Last
The Legend of the Chaos God
The Life and Times of Scrooge McDuck
The Man Who Stole The World
The New Adventures of Jack and Jack
The One Where Bizarro Screws Up Time
The Reign of the Black Flame
The Resurrection of Ra's al Ghul
The Return of the Jungle Lord
The Return of the Scarlet Ghost
The Road To Civil War II
The Road to You, Getting There
The Road to You, Leaving There
The Sea Beneath the City (2000 AD)
The Secret History of Superman & Batman
The Secret History of Task Force X
The Secret Life of Eva Bell
The Secret Lives of Dead Men
The Secret of the Hell Screen
The Secrets of the Blood Dynasty
The Seven Capital Cities of Heaven
The Shape of Things to Come
The Ultimate Jack of Fables Story
The Unity Saga: The House of El
The War of Jokes and Riddles
The Wedding of Crystal and Pietro
The Wubba Lubba Dub Dub of Wall Street
Those Who Can't Teach, Teach Gym
Time Warp (Gold Digger / Ninja High School)
Up is Down and Black is White
Up North and in the Green
War of the Green Lanterns: Aftermath
What Are Little Boys Made Of?
What You Want, Not What You Need
Whatever Happened to the Caped Crusader?
Whatever Happened to the Man of Tomorrow?
Where the River Meets the Sea
Year of the Villain: Dark Gifts
Year of the Villain: Doom Rising
Year of the Villain: Evil Unleashed
Year of the Villain: Hostile Takeover
Year of the Villain: The Offer
You Always Remember Your First Love
You Gotta Sin to Get Saved
